system.effect: The sorcerer infests the target with a horrid wasting disease: virulence 10+, damage 2d6, interval 2d6 days. While ill, the subject suffers a -2 penalty to all skill and attack throws. Their wounds will not heal on their own, and no healing magic can help. A Restoration spell is the only way to cure this illness.
system.critSuccess: The disease has virulence 12+, damage 4d6, interval 1d6 days.
